metadata.purpose: Stress-test token efficiency for large planning documents.

phases.title: Large benchmark phase 1
phases.summary: This phase models a realistic multi-team implementation plan with dependencies, risk tracking, acceptance criteria, and status metadata.

milestones.title: Milestone 1 for phase 1
milestones.objective: Validate that large operational planning documents remain compact, readable, and lossless when converted to SDIF.

tasks.title: Implement governed planning task PLN-01-01-001
acceptance_criteria: The change is covered by deterministic tests.
The implementation preserves existing public contracts.
The benchmark output is reproducible from canonical JSON.
The generated SDIF output can be parsed without semantic loss.

risk.description: Potential drift between generated benchmark data and hand-maintained fixtures if canonical JSON is bypassed.
risk.mitigation: Keep JSON as the only semantic source of truth.
